title: January 12, 2015 – Shibastik
summary: From Moosonee, Ontario and member of the Moose Cree First Nation, hip-hop artist Shibastik (Chris G. Sutherland) creates positive and empowering native music for listeners of all ages and backgrounds. Shibastik has been releasing music independently since 1998.
